div1.entryFree:
Reflection, 1) the act of throwing back: Troil. III, 3, 99. Caes. I, 2, 53. Caes. I, 2, 53 Cymb. I, 2, 35.
2) the act of shining: as whence the sun 'gins his r. shipwrecking storms and direful thunders break, Mcb. I, 2, 25. she's a good sign, but I have seen small r. of her wit, Cymb. I, 2, 33.
